pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 26-59 create the entire backlog file with a heredoc containing fabricated FoodRescue app data

privileged_info_summary: Task agile_user_story_map@1 creates a User Story Map in draw.io version 26.0.9 (released January 27, 2025) using synthetic backlog data. The backlog file (/home/ga/Desktop/foodrescue_backlog.txt) is generated by the setup script and contains 5 activities (Registration, Donation Posting, Inventory Browse, Claim Process, Impact Tracking) with 20 user stories (11 MVP, 9 V2) for a fictional FoodRescue app. The task requires creating shapes colored with draw.io's standard default color scheme: blue shapes (#dae8fc fill, #6c8ebf stroke) for activities arranged horizontally as the backbone, and yellow shapes (#fff2cc fill, #d6b656 stroke) for stories in vertical columns, with MVP stories visually separated above V2 stories. Output files: /home/ga/Desktop/foodrescue_storymap.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/foodrescue_storymap.png.
